title: asplenium fraxinifolium
intro: Asplenium fraxinifolium, also known as the lime fern or green spleenwort, is a type of fern that belongs to the Aspleniaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Asplenium fraxinifolium include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Asplenium fraxinifolium can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy for various health concerns.
